step_rationale: Kynurenine aminotransferase; upregulated in macrophages during acute MI.
mechanism: KAT1 upregulation in macrophages during acute myocardial infarction reflects kynurenine pathway activation and plaque inflammation.

references.title: Kynurenic Acid Is a Predictive Prognostic Metabolic Marker in ST-Elevation Myocardial Infarction.
